entries.name: Acute Otitis Media (AOM) - Unilateral
entries.text: Amoxicillin 90 mg/kg/day divided BID x 10 days. Discussed diagnosis, expected course, and return precautions with family. Follow up if no improvement in 48-72 hours or sooner if worsening.

entries.name: Viral URI
entries.text: Supportive care recommended including saline nasal rinses, humidified air, honey for cough (if older than 1 year), and adequate hydration. No antibiotics indicated at this time. Return if fever persists longer than 5 days, symptoms worsen, or new symptoms develop.

entries.name: Strep Pharyngitis
entries.text: Started amoxicillin per weight-based dosing. Advised replacement of toothbrush after 24 hours of antibiotics and discussed return precautions for persistent fever, poor intake, or worsening throat pain.

entries.name: Viral syndrome
entries.text: Clinical presentation consistent with viral syndrome. Supportive care, hydration guidance, fever control, and return precautions reviewed in detail.
